nestai-postgres.description: Direct read access to the NestAI PostgreSQL database — query listings, neighborhoods, student_profiles, fraud_reports, contracts, roommate_requests, universities, notifications.

nestai-filesystem.description: Full filesystem access scoped to the NestAI project root — read/write source files, migrations, seeds, specs, notebooks.

nestai-git.description: Git operations on the NestAI repo — read commit history, diffs, blame, branches, tags, and file change logs.

nestai-fetch.description: HTTP fetch tool — call the NestAI REST API at http://localhost:8000, read external docs, or test endpoints without leaving the conversation.

nestai-redis.description: Inspect live Redis state — session tokens, LLM cache keys, rate-limit counters, pub/sub channels, embed locks.
